message:
🐛 Fix: What's New button does nothing on click (kill-switch removal) (#8527)

* 🐛 fix: remove What's New kill-switch (dead button on click)

The kill-switch code path rendered a green update button that did
nothing on click — it called updateHint.action() (tooltip dismiss)
but never opened the WhatsNewModal. Users who had the kill-switch
localStorage key set from earlier dev work got a dead button.

The kill-switch was a rollout safety net from the initial What's New
modal PR. The modal has been live with no regressions — removing the
kill-switch entirely so the button always opens the modal.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🧹 auto-remove stale kill-switch localStorage key on load

Users who had kc-whats-new-modal-disabled set from dev work would
get a dead button. Rather than requiring manual localStorage
cleanup, remove the key automatically on module load.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

     <>
